Ensuring compliance and cost savings.", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Potential loss of $150 and inefficiency if duplicate submission occurs.", "constitutional_violations_detected": "None", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
amendment_if_yes_amended: A) 83(b) verification + Mercury bank research, with added step to explicitly check Stripe Atlas automatic 83(b) filing to avoid duplicate submission
rationale: Avoiding $150 loss from duplicate 83(b) submission as in Class 19. Ensuring compliance and cost savings.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Potential loss of $150 and inefficiency if duplicate submission occurs.
